mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verification_token (user_id, token, expires_at, used, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification_token SET used = 1 WHERE token = #{token}

UPDATE email_verification_token SET used = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND used = 0
AND token LIKE CONCAT(#{tokenPrefix}, '%')
AND token NOT LIKE 'rst-%'
